prs_created.description: perf: optimize buffer realloc to single call; build: drop AC_C_CONST
prs_created.note: Patch at aw-repo-assist-perf-buffer-realloc-once.patch. Apply with git am.

checked_off_by_maintainer: Apply patch for CI typo fix + macOS autoreconf cleanup (applied as commit 24bfa0d)
Apply patch for new buffer tests (test_83, test_84) - applied as commit 0cee5e9
Apply patch to upgrade SourceForge URLs from http to https - applied as commit 03276e4
Apply patch for pkg.m4 update (applied as commit b35d447)
Apply patch for creator const-correctness (applied as commit f9c310a)
notes: No regular open issues in the repo. Workflow files (.github/workflows/) are protected. Past changes applied by maintainer directly to master: libxml2 CI removal (5367634), buffer tests (0251ad2), buffer byte arrays (e7030f4), CI typo fix (24bfa0d), buffer set/append tests (0cee5e9), HTTPS URLs (03276e4), pkg.m4 update (b35d447), creator const (f9c310a), stdatomic C23 fix (ec5e009). Buffer functions fully tested (tests 77-84). 2026-04-09 patch: optimize buffer reallocate_to_new_size to single realloc call; remove obsolete AC_C_CONST from configure.ac. Next runs: consider tests for creator.c functions, snap_accessors, tape_accessors, IDE functions, microdrive functions.
